candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related amortization line, but it appears as a component beneath the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold', so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Cost of Goods Sold
candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related depreciation line, but it is presented as a sub-component of the selected 'Cost of goods sold' total rather than a same-level separate expense line.
This label suggests a COGS D&A summary, but it is blank in the excerpt and therefore not usable.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is [Income Statement] Cost of goods sold. The visible COGS D&A rows are nested components of that selected total, not separate same-level operating lines to add later. Conservative no-double-counting treatment is final_choice=[].

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related amortization appears under both 'Sales and distribution costs' and 'Administrative costs', indicating it is already embedded in the selected XSGA parent buckets rather than separate from them.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related depreciation appears as a component under selected SG&A rows, so separate addition would likely double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D amortization is shown as a component under 'Research and development costs'. Because that R&D row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, this should not be added separately per the R&D interaction rule.

R&D depreciation is a sub-component of the selected 'Research and development costs' row and should not be separately added, especially since the same R&D parent is already used for both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combined set of 'Sales and distribution costs', 'Research and development costs', 'Administrative costs', and 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Other'. The visible SG&A/R&D D&A rows are presented as sub-components within those selected buckets, not as separate same-level operating rows. Also, 'Research and development costs' is already selected for both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding R&D D&A separately would distort the intended subtraction logic. Therefore final_choice=[] to avoid double counting.
